name: @borjie/data-protection
description: SEC-3 (Mr. Mwikila) — universal data-protection package. AES-256-GCM AEAD via @noble/ciphers, envelope encryption, BYOK/HYOK key-manager port, key rotation, 8-class classification lattice (public|internal|confidential|restricted|critical|pii|phi|financial), retention policies + auto-purge respecting legal holds, RTBF orchestrator + cascade planner, breach detector + N-hour authority+subject notifier, OpenLineage provenance tracker. Pure ports; no DB or KMS dependency at type level. Jurisdiction-agnostic — every regulator-bound parameter (notification-window-hours, retention-days, lawful-basis IDs) is sourced from a ComplianceFrameworkPort the caller supplies (see @borjie/jurisdiction-profiles / @borjie/compliance-plugins).
